assertions.text: Uses claudit index lookup with kind=definitions OR claudit index get-body
assertions.evidence: Agent ran 'claudit index lookup ScimGroupProvisioning ... --kind definitions' then 'claudit index get-body ScimGroupProvisioning ... --language java'.

assertions.text: Identifies the correct file and line number for ScimGroupProvisioning
Does not just grep the source directory manually without claudit
assertions.evidence: All lookups used claudit CLI. Also first ran claudit index create to confirm index exists.
